evaluation.name: stofs-mcp
evaluation.description: Evaluation questions for STOFS MCP server testing multi-tool workflows.

question.prompt: What is the latest available STOFS-2D-Global forecast cycle?
question.expected_info: cycle date, cycle hour (00/06/12/18z), availability status

question.prompt: Get the STOFS water level forecast for The Battery, NY (station 8518750) for the most recent cycle.
question.expected_info: time series table, model cycle, datum (LMSL), min/max/mean summary

question.prompt: What are the top 10 stations with the highest predicted water levels in the latest STOFS-2D-Global forecast?
question.expected_info: ranked table of stations with max water level values in meters

question.prompt: Compare STOFS-2D-Global forecast against CO-OPS observations at Boston (8443970) for the past 24 hours.
question.expected_info: bias, RMSE, MAE, correlation, datum note, time series comparison table

question.prompt: Find STOFS output stations within 50 km of Miami Beach (lat 25.79, lon -80.13).
question.expected_info: list of nearby stations with distances, filtered to Miami area

question.prompt: What is the surge-only (non-tidal) forecast at Charleston, SC (8665530)?
question.expected_info: surge water level time series, note that this is non-tidal residual

question.prompt: How does STOFS-3D-Atlantic forecast compare to STOFS-2D-Global at The Battery for the latest cycle?
question.expected_info: two time series side by side, note datum differences (NAVD88 vs LMSL)

question.prompt: What are the differences between STOFS-2D-Global and STOFS-3D-Atlantic in terms of domain, resolution, cycle schedule, and datums?
question.expected_info: full comparison of both models including mesh size, forcing, cycles, datums

question.prompt: Get the STOFS forecast at lat 29.95, lon -90.07 (near New Orleans) for the latest cycle.
question.expected_info: nearest station name and distance, water level forecast time series

question.prompt: List all STOFS stations in Texas and show the latest forecast for the station closest to Galveston.
question.expected_info: Texas station list, then forecast time series for the Galveston area station
